subject: refactor(editor): replace inline row editor with modal dialog
body:
The inline editor was cramped in table rows and pushed content around.
Replaced with a proper modal following existing patterns (TutorialModal,
InstallInstructionsModal) — Teleport, backdrop, focus trapping via
useDialogA11y, Save/Cancel buttons. Changes are only persisted on
explicit Save click rather than on every keystroke.

Tags: editor, ux, modal, refactor
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: auto-tagging
Semver: minor
